relative_path: PERSONNEL/Lab Management team /Role descriptions /Role description Clinical Research Coordinator.docx
full_text:
Clinical Research Coordinator (Maija) Responsibilities in Färkkilä Lab

Clinical Team Coordination

Coordinates the clinical research team, overseeing its operations, roles, and resources

Organizes and facilitates monthly team meetings (1x/month)

Operational Coordination

Manages research nurse collaboration with Laura and Karen

Collaborates with DB developers and clinicians to enhance DB functionalities

Liaises with clinicians and researchers (Matilda, Anni H, Ullis, Anniina)

Coordinates information sharing with OR and outpatient clinic staff

Clinical Data Coordination

Updates patient data in collaboration with Karen, Laura, Anni H

Maintains and revises written guidelines

Coordinates data requests from other hospital districts (with Karen)

Responds to clinical data requests (DB exports)

Registry and Data Coordination

Maintains and develops harmonized research registries by mapping data usage across systems, organizing shared structures, and ensuring consistency

Biobank Coordination

Handles data requests and transfers (e.g., iCAN)

Research Collaboration

Facilitates collaboration and meetings with academic research groups

Monitors and reports on scientific projects, publications, and tracks progress and objectives of Principal Investigators (with Joonas)

Industry Collaboration

Communications, legal agreements and documentation (with Joonas)

Communications

Facilitates collaboration with patient organizations and organizes researcher-patient meetings and related events

Research Permissions

Supports updates to HUS ethical approvals and NKL research permits

Explores options for electronic consent and scanning of consent forms (with Karen)

Key resources for functions:

Adding patients and updating patient data in the database:

Matilda Salko, Anni Härkönen, Laura Haapasalo, Karen Ahlnäs

Adding patients and updating patient data in other registries:

Matilda Salko, Anni Härkönen, Karen Ahlnäs

Coordinating patient data updates:

Matilda Salko (in collaboration with Anni Härkönen, Laura Haapasalo, and Karen Ahlnäs)

Exports from the database: Matilda Salko, Anni Härkönen

Main communication channels:

kliinisen-datan-päivitys

oncosys-ova_clinical_team, oncosys-ova_ft-sample_collection, oncosys-tutkimushoitajat, ovarian_sample_collection

Channels might be restricted access, ask to be added to the channel

Main contact for the Gynecological outpatient clinic:

Research nurse Laura Haapasalo (consent matters, coordination of sample collection – blood and surgical samples)

Main contact for the Women's Clinic surgical department:

Gynecologic oncologist Ulla-Maija Haltia (guidance for sample collection in operating rooms)
